_publications._publicationTitle: Stepwise crosstalk between aberrant Nf1, Tp53 and Rb signalling pathways induces gliomagenesis in zebrafish.

_contextSnippet: TMZ treatment significantly increased the survival rates of nf1 KO and nf1;tp53 cKO fish. Additionally, TMZ effectively suppressed gliomagenesis in nf1 KO and nf1;tp53 cKO fish (42.6% and 49.3%, respectively)
details: Significantly increased survival rates and suppressed gliomagenesis by 42.6% in nf1 KO fish and 49.3% in nf1;tp53 cKO fish
